name: United Quest℠ Card
title: United Quest℠ Card (Chase)
text:
Card: United Quest℠ Card (Chase)
BEST FOR OCCASIONAL UNITED FLYERS
Pros: Earn 3 miles per dollar spent on United purchases and 2 miles per dollar spent on a variety of other categories,Get a first and second checked bag free for the cardholder and a companion,Priority boarding on United- and United Express-operated flights,25% off eligible inflight purchases
Cons: Day-of-travel perks limited to United and some partner flights,Other United cards have higher earning rates on some purchases,You might get more use from transferable points instead of United miles
Why we chose it: The United Quest Card is an excellent choice for folks who fly United occasionally and can take advantage of benefits like a first and second checked bag free on flights, priority boarding and a 25% discount on inflight food, drink and Wi-Fi purchases. You can save on award flight redemptions, too, thanks to a 10,000-mile anniversary award flight credit to use toward flights on United or United Express, and another 10,000-mile bonus you can earn after spending $20,000 on purchases in a calendar year. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: Flyers who want to double down on their United loyalty will find plenty to like in the United Quest card. Carrying it improves your day-of-travel experience with free checked bags and priority boarding (not to mention a Global Entry/TSA PreCheck application fee credit worth up to $120 once every four years). It also helps you save on United purchases with $200 in United TravelBank cash each year.
Annual fee: $350
Recommended credit: 670-850
Rewards: 1 - 3X miles
Intro bonus: Earn 80,000 bonus miles and 3,000 Premier qualifying points after you spend $4,000 on purchases in the first 3 months your account is open.
Points valuation: 1.5
APR: 19.74% - 28.24% Variable,19.74% - 28.24% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99%
Benefits: Receive up to $125 in statement credits each account anniversary year as reimbursement for United purchases charged to your United Quest Card. Get 5,000 miles back in your MileagePlus account after you take a United or United Express-operated award flight booked with your miles, up to 2 times every anniversary year. The primary Cardmember and one companion can each check a first and second standard bags for free - save up to $360 per roundtrip. Premier qualifying points (PQP) help you earn MileagePlus Premier¬Æ status, which provides you with an enhanced travel experience. You'll earn 25 PQP for every $500 you spend on purchases with your Quest Card (up to 6,000 PQP in a calendar year) that can be applied toward your Premier status qualification, up to and including the Premier 1K¬Æ level. The primary Cardmember and companions on the same reservation will be invited to board United-operated flights prior to general boarding. Receive a statement credit of up to $100 every 4 years as reimbursement for the application fee for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck or NEXUS when charged to your card. Get 25% back as a statement credit on purchases of food, beverages and Wi-Fi on board United-operated flights and on Club premium drinks when you pay with your Quest Card. You can be reimbursed for your pre-paid, non-refundable passenger fares if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather and other covered situations. Reimburses you for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours by passenger carrier. If you or an immediate family member check or carry on luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier, you're covered. If your common carrier travel is delayed more than 12 hours or requires an overnight stay, you and your family are covered for unreimbursed expenses, such as meals and lodging. Decline the rental company's collision insurance and charge the entire rental cost to your card. Coverage is primary and provides reimbursement for theft and collision damage for most rental cars in the U.S. and abroad. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft. Extends the time period of the manufacturer's U.S warranty by an additional year, on eligible warranties of three years or less. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar that provides unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fees and lower service fees on eligible orders. After that, you are automatically enrolled in DashPass at the current monthly rate. Activate by 12/31/24.
Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/reviews/united-quest-card-review/
